title: Architect WorldCup predictions
description: Output contract for a single prediction run.

generated_at.description: UTC timestamp when the run was generated.

as_of_date.description: Leakage boundary; no data after this date enters the model.

model_version.description: Version of the model that produced these predictions.

git_sha.description: Git commit sha of the code that produced these predictions.

forecast_summary.description: For a live dated forecast: the cutoff, the leakage proof, the data snapshot, and the current real group standings. Null for a plain run.

predictions.description: Per-team tournament stage and win probabilities.

p_round_of_32.description: Probability the team reaches the round of 32.

p_round_of_16.description: Probability the team reaches the round of 16.

p_quarter_final.description: Probability the team reaches the quarter-final.

p_semi_final.description: Probability the team reaches the semi-final.

p_final.description: Probability the team reaches the final.

p_win.description: Probability the team wins the tournament.
